data.title: Neda Nobari introduces Maryam Mirzakhani Presidential Scholarships at San Francisco State Univ: full-ride for first-gen STEM students.
data.description: In a significant development, MOZAIK Philanthropy has announced a substantial endowment in San Francisco on September 25, 2025. This impactful initiative includes full-ride scholarships and leadership training for first-generation students in STEM disciplines. By enabling access and support to these pioneering individuals, the endowment aims to foster innovation and shape the future of STEM fields.

data.title: Focus on Ethereum's cost basis amid slowing ETF and treasury investments with market correction; attention on realized price for Ethereum addresses.
data.description: Amidst uncertainty in the macroeconomic landscape, the crypto market is experiencing a correction. Investors are closely monitoring the realized price for Ethereum as they focus on accumulating addresses.

data.title: Olay Body and Secret launch limited-edition Wicked: For Good collection inspired by witches of Oz, featuring serum-infused body washes and deodorants with enchanting scents. Available now at major retailers.
data.description: Cincinnati-based beauty brands Olay Body and Secret have launched a limited-time Wicked: For Good collection to elevate body care routines. This new collection draws inspiration from the mystical realms of the witches of Oz, Elphaba and Glinda, offering serum-infused body washes and clinical strength deodorants. Infused with advanced skincare technology and enchanting scents, the collection aims to provide a magical experience. Available for purchase now at various major retailers, the collection promises to transform mundane body care into something extraordinary.

data.title: Charlie Sheen introduces Wild AF non-alcoholic beer in Los Angeles.
data.description: In Los Angeles, actor Charlie Sheen is making waves in the non-alcoholic beer industry with the introduction of Wild AF. The product marks a significant departure from traditional alcoholic beverages, signaling a shift towards healthier alternatives. This move comes amidst growing concerns over the consumption of alcohol and its impact on health. With the launch of Wild AF, Sheen is aiming to tap into a market that is increasingly seeking non-alcoholic options. This bold new venture showcases Sheen's innovative spirit and willingness to embrace change, setting the stage for a potential shift in the way consumers view and consume beer. The launch of Wild AF represents a notable development in the beverage industry and highlights the potential for growth in the non-alcoholic sector. Sheen's foray into this market underscores the growing demand for health-conscious alternatives and suggests a promising future for non-alcoholic beverages.

data.title: Dentsply Sirona partners with Pearl to integrate AI-assisted radiologic support into DS Core imaging software. #AI #DentalCare
data.description: In Los Angeles, Dentsply Sirona has integrated Pearl's Second Opinion dental AI features into their DS Core imaging software, which operates on the cloud. This collaboration aims to enhance the capabilities of the software.

data.title: Ryan has been named one of Glassdoor’s Best-Led Companies of 2025, ranking 17 out of 50. Exceptional leadership honored.
data.description: A well-known tax services and software provider, Ryan, based in PLANO, Texas, has recently received recognition as one of Glassdoor's Best-Led Companies of 2025. They secured the 17th spot out of 50 on this esteemed list, which highlights businesses with outstanding senior leadership qualities. This accolade is a testament to Ryan's dedication to fostering a positive employee experience through transparent and effective leadership practices. The company prides itself on being a transparent, high-performing, and inclusive organization focused on promoting meritocracy within its operations.

data.title: Fractal Bitcoin introduces Wrapped FB (WFB), an ERC-20 token on Ethereum, expanding into Ethereum ecosystem.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, it was publicized that Fractal Bitcoin has disclosed the launch of Wrapped Fractal Bitcoin (WFB). WFB is an ERC-20 version of the Fractal Bitcoin token (FB) intended for use on Ethereum. This move signifies Fractal Bitcoin's initial venture into the Ethereum network, highlighting its efforts to expand its presence.

data.title: Alibaba's stock surges 107% after boosting AI budget past $50B, with CEO projecting global AI investment reaching $4T in five years.
data.description: Alibaba Group's (NYSE: BABA) stock reached its highest level in almost four years after revealing plans to expand its artificial intelligence investment, exceeding the previously stated target of $50 billion. Even though the stock is currently down on Thursday, it has soared by 107% year-to-date, outperforming the NYSE Composite index (which includes Alibaba) by more than 12% in returns. The incoming CEO, Eddie Wu, anticipates that worldwide AI spending could hit $4 trillion in the next five years. He has affirmed Alibaba's intention to augment its initial plan announced in February to allocate 380 billion yuan (equivalent to $53 billion) over three years towards AI models and infrastructure. This information was reported by Bloomberg on Thursday. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Luxurious estate in Syosset, NY spans 5 acres on North Shore, features 2 residences and resort amenities.
data.description: Situated on a tranquil portion of North Syosset in New York, a private compound occupying five gated acres at 365 Split Rock Road boasts two residences, resort amenities, and vast property. This estate is regarded as one of the area's most remarkable new properties, offering a secluded retreat for its residents.

data.title: Inventor from Flagler Beach, Fla. develops BAND-IT-TOWELS for easy hanging on hooks, prevents slipping.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 25, 2025, an inventor from Flagler Beach, Florida shared the creation of BAND-IT-TOWELS, aimed at providing a convenient way to hang towels on hooks. The inventor's innovative design ensures the towels stay in place, potentially enhancing drying.

data.title: Amanda McGuckin Hager promoted to CMO & CRO at TrueDialog, a leading SMS solution provider in Austin, Texas.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on September 25, 2025, TrueDialog, a prominent company offering enterprise-level SMS texting solutions, revealed the appointment of Amanda McGuckin Hager as the Chief Marketing Officer & Chief Revenue Officer (CMO & CRO). McGuckin Hager's promotion signifies a pivotal move within the company as she takes on the dual role to drive marketing and revenue strategies.

data.title: OMED conference in Nashville, hosting world's largest gathering of osteopathic physicians and students from Sept 25-28.
data.description: A significant gathering of osteopathic physicians, the Osteopathic Medical Education Conference (OMED) organized by the American Osteopathic Association, is scheduled from September 25 to 28 in Nashville, Tennessee. This event stands as the largest yearly assembly of osteopathic medical professionals worldwide.

data.title: Penn Station East Coast Subs collaborates with Barstool Sports for MEGA CHEESESTEAK. Announcement made Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In collaboration with Barstool Sports' Pardon My Take and Virtual Dining Concepts, Penn Station East Coast Subs introduces a new menu item in Cincinnati on September 25, 2025. The franchise, renowned for its diverse selection of grilled-to-order subs and deli classics, has partnered to offer an exciting addition to its menu. This collaboration is set to bring a unique offering to customers, further enhancing the dining experience.
